items.title: Google CEO drops a bombshell comment on AI bubble
items.description: In an ongoing trend, experts often admit that artificial intelligence represents a bubble. While the discussion about the AI bubble began before OpenAI’s CEO, Sam Altman, shared his opinion, it seems that he signaled to everyone else that it's okay to talk about it. Altman said in his August ...

items.title: Why Amazon Stock Plummeted Today
items.description: The latest news for the company on the regulatory and analysis fronts wasn't encouraging.

items.title: Why Amazon (AMZN) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
items.description: Shares of cloud computing and online retail behemoth Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) fell 3.4% in the afternoon session after concerns regarding lofty artificial intelligence valuations triggered a pullback in the technology sector.

items.title: Why This Expert Says 'We No Longer See a Bull Case' for These Two Magnificent 7 Stocks
items.description: Rothschild & Co Redburn's Alex Haissl downgraded Amazon and Microsoft to a neutral rating.
